meta.title: Islamic Study Circle Attendance Bot
meta.description: A Telegram bot that tracks attendance for Islamic study, memorisation and recitation circles — both live groups and private offline classes.

hero.badge: For Islamic study, memorisation & recitation circles
hero.title: Organised attendance for your circle — no paper, no hassle
hero.subtitle: An Arabic-first Telegram bot that records attendance for any study circle — live groups or private classes — manages the weekly schedule, materials and homework, and keeps everyone's privacy.

features.title: Everything a teacher needs in one place
features.subtitle: Built around how study circles actually run.

attendance.title: One-tap attendance
attendance.desc: Mark who is present or absent right inside the Telegram group; the message updates itself.

tagging.title: Guest & pending tags
tagging.desc: Know at a glance who is a confirmed member and who is still awaiting approval, so no newcomer slips through and your roster stays clean.

mentions.title: Tag students & teachers
mentions.desc: Mention all students — or teachers by role — with one command to grab attention for an important announcement.

offline.title: Private offline classes
offline.desc: Run a private class from your own chat — students never have to touch the bot.

roster.title: Weekly schedule
roster.desc: Organise class days and teachers, and share the schedule as a polished image.

materials.title: Teaching materials
materials.desc: Upload lesson files — documents, photos, videos or audio — and re-share them with the class on demand; the bot keeps them ready to resend anytime.

homework.title: Homework tracking
homework.desc: Assign homework and follow who has completed it, so no student's work slips through the cracks.

reports.title: History & reports
reports.desc: Review the attendance of past sessions and edit any session at any time.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.desc: Data is stored securely and students are only visible to those with permission.

guide.title: How to use the bot
guide.subtitle: Two ways to work: live circles inside a Telegram group, or private classes managed from your own chat where students never touch the bot.

online.title: Live circles (inside a group)
online.subtitle: Students interact with the bot in the group.
steps: Add the bot to your group.
Start an attendance list with one command.
Add teachers and view the weekly roster.
Link training groups to the main group.
Link a homework group to manage and review homework.
Track student progress across the main group and linked groups via student history.
Review past sessions and edit any class history.

offline.title: Private classes
offline.subtitle: Managed from your chat — students never touch the bot.
steps: Add cooperators to help you manage it.
Add teachers and view the weekly roster.
Add homework and let students view and reply to it.
Track student progress in the class.

demo.title: See how the bot works
demo.subtitle: It all starts with a command from the teacher, and the registration widget appears. Students register with one tap, and unlisted visitors are recorded automatically — the bot then pings the teacher in the group to approve them via a private panel. Try the buttons yourself.

nudge.hint: Tap the button to open the requests panel in our private chat.

widget.prompt: Welcome — tap the option below to register your attendance:

approval.note: The visitor's attendance was recorded automatically — approve to add them to the roster.

developers.title: For developers
developers.subtitle: The project is open source — contributions are very welcome.

source.title: Browse the code
source.desc: Explore the structure and conventions in the repo.

issue.title: Report a bug
issue.desc: Found something off? Open an issue and we'll fix it.

feature.title: Request a feature
feature.desc: Share your idea to improve the bot.

pr.title: Open a pull request
pr.desc: Send a PR — we review and welcome contributions.
